elements.description: ระดับอ้างอิง ±0.00, ระดับพื้นชั้น 1 +0.60, ระดับพื้นชั้น 2 +3.75, ระดับคานหลังคา +6.65 (height chain 0.60 + 3.15 + 2.90 = 6.65)
'ราวกันตก ดูแบบขยาย A-23' — 2nd-floor balcony/ระเบียง guardrail at the upper-right, roughly grid2-3, in front of a recessed balcony opening with a visible balustrade drawn below the window
two window openings tagged hexagon '1', upper floor, left side (grid1 area, likely นอน3)
window opening tagged hexagon '1', upper floor, right side (grid2-3 area, ระเบียง/นอน1), with the ราวกันตก guardrail below it
diagonally cross-hatched ('X') panel, lower/ground floor, left-of-center — possibly a ventilated/louvered panel rather than a standard glazed window; not confidently classified
hexagon '2' tagged opening, lower floor, center-right
window opening tagged hexagon '1', lower/ground floor, right side
'เซาะร่อง หรือ ฝังเส้น PVC' reveal lines, one just below the roof-beam line, one at the upper-floor level line, one at the lower-floor level line

Several small triangle symbols each containing '1', scattered across the facade at various heights — not part of the door/window numbering (which uses hexagons per the symbol legend, หน้า03); purpose not confidently identified, possibly weep-holes, vent points, or a different reference-tag convention specific to this elevation drawing.

warnings: GRID-RELEVANT (reporting only, master file not edited): the bottom dimension chain reads '0.70 | 0.60 | 5.00 | 3.50 | 0.60 | 0.70' with a secondary grouping '1.30 | 8.50 | 1.30' — matches the master grid's x_lines (1=0.0,2=5.0,3=8.5) plus the 1.30m roof overhangs seen on the roof plan (หน้า08); the sub-split of the 1.30 total into 0.60 (to grid1/3) + 0.70 (further overhang beyond the wall face) is printed but not independently reconciled against any other sheet.

This elevation corresponds to compass-slot '1' on the floor plan's 4-way elevation callout bubble (referencing sheet A-07) — cardinal direction (e.g. north/south) not independently confirmed from this sheet alone, only the sheet-to-slot mapping.

Flat parapet-topped facade with a plain fascia band at the roof edge — the 2nd-floor balcony recess with guardrail (ราวกันตก, A-23) is the most distinctive feature of this elevation, consistent with it facing the ระเบียง/นอน1 side of the upper floor plan (หน้า07).

Individual door/window opening-number-to-D/W-schedule cross-match not confidently resolvable at this resolution — see the door/window schedule sheet (A-14, หน้า16 or later per this house's index) once read.

The recurring small triangle-'1' markers are a notable point of ambiguity worth flagging for human review since they don't correspond to any symbol documented on the legend page (หน้า03) — possibly weep holes, downspout markers, or an elevation-specific annotation convention.
